title: AXDonutChartOption
description: Configuration options for the donut chart component including dimensions, styling, animations, and interactive features

types.title: AXDonutChartOption
types.description: Configuration options for the donut chart

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the chart in pixels. If not provided, will use container width

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the chart in pixels. If not provided, will use container height

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltips on hover

props.name: showDataLabels
props.description: Whether to show percentage labels inside chart segments. Labels will only appear on segments large enough to fit text

props.name: donutWidth
props.description: Width of the donut ring as a percentage (10-90). Higher values create a thicker ring

props.name: cornerRadius
props.description: Radius for rounded corners on segments in pixels

props.name: animationEasing
props.description: Type of easing function for animations

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Canonical interface definition from source code
